subject.description: A man in his early 40s, tan skin, light stubble, wearing a loose linen shirt with rolled sleeves. Hair slightly wind-tousled. Relaxed posture, leaning back on a wooden bar stool with one arm resting on the counter. Bare feet visible below the stool. Micro expression: corners of mouth turned slightly upward, eyes half-closed in a content squint, the involuntary face of someone who just realized they have nothing to worry about.
subject.action: Sitting at a weathered teak beach bar, laptop closed in front of him, phone face-down on the bar showing a single notification glow through the screen. One hand loosely holding a coffee cup. Looking out toward the sunrise over calm water.

setting.location: Open-air beach bar on a quiet tropical coast. Teak wood counter, simple bamboo roof overhead. Calm turquoise ocean in the background with a soft horizon line. No other people. A few palm fronds framing the edges. The bar is simple, not resort-luxurious.
setting.time_of_day: Early morning, just after sunrise. Golden amber light from the east casting long warm shadows across the bar surface.

composition.camera_angle: Wide shot, eye-level, slightly to the left of center.
composition.framing: Rule of thirds. Subject positioned in the left third. Ocean and sunrise fill the right two-thirds. Headspace above. Feet visible at bottom with breathing room.

lighting.type: Natural golden hour sun from the east, warm amber light hitting the subject's face and arms. Soft fill from reflected ocean light.
lighting.color_grading: Warm amber and golden tones, slight film grain, rich shadows.

mood: Peaceful relief. The feeling of a Monday morning where the work is already done. Quiet confidence without urgency.
aesthetic_style: 8K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Shot on Canon EOS R5.
